title: BallsPack 1000
description: Create and computer based modpack for Forge 1.18.2
body: ## Welcome to the "BallsPack 1000" Modpack! This is yet another BallsPack modpack, this time based on Create and computer mods like OpenComputers II(Runs ""Linux""), and of course ComputerCraft! We also have Valkyrien Skies 2 and an addon to integrate to CompuerCraft, so you can make a CLOUD server.....
